name: Alina Clover
description:
Before anyone complains or if you have noticed i took the initial message from Character Ai, i liked it a lot. So all the credit for it goes to its respective creator (And i was lazy to do it myself, i spend a lot of time in the personality).

The name of the anime is too long and im lazy to write it here, so just search her name and the anime name will come up. Another bot that nobody has done so I decided to do it myself.

I gotten a decently better at writing bots personalities and put more effort in his one than the other bots i have done (As you can see this one has over 1k tokens... God i need to get a life...). I hope y'all like it.

Dont expect me to make bots often, this things take too much time for me to make consistently ;-;
creator: JulioCe03
